HomePage.title: Smart Financial Management
HomePage.description: Control spending, save effectively and achieve financial freedom with MoneyMate.

features.title: Beyond just a recording app
features.description: MoneyMate provides powerful yet easy-to-use tools for you to optimize your personal finance management.

fastRecording.title: Super-fast recording
fastRecording.description: Record income and expenses with just 2 taps. Smart classification based on your habits.

diverseStats.title: Diverse statistics
diverseStats.description: Understand your cash flow through vivid and detailed pie, bar, and line charts over time.

multiLayerSecurity.title: Multi-layer security
multiLayerSecurity.description: End-to-end data encryption and support for fingerprint/face ID security. Your finances are always safe.

savingPlan.title: Savings planning
savingPlan.description: Set goals for buying a house, car, travel and track progress in the most intuitive way.

cloudSync.title: Cloud synchronization
cloudSync.description: Your data is instantly synced across all devices. Never worry about data loss.

groupManagement.title: Group/Family management
groupManagement.description: Unique feature helps you and your loved ones manage common funds transparently and easily.

testimonials.quote: "MoneyMate has completely changed the way I spend money"
testimonials.description: I used to not know where my money went at the end of the month. Thanks to MoneyMate, I saved my first 100 million after 1 year of use.
testimonials.author: Nam Le

cta.title: Ready to become a financial "master"?
cta.description: Start managing your finances effectively today. MoneyMate is committed to being free forever for basic features.

dialog.title: Customize Dashboard
dialog.description: Turn on/off components displayed on your overview page.

widgets.chartPlaceholder: Charts will be updated in the next version
widgets.budgetAlert: Category {category} has used {percent}% of this month's limit.

Footer.mission: MoneyMate is built with the mission to help millions of Vietnamese people control their personal finances and achieve financial freedom.

Categories.title: Categories
Categories.description: Manage your income and expense categories
Categories.addDescription: Create a new category to classify your transactions.

list.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this category?

Transactions.title: Transactions
Transactions.description: Manage and search your transaction history
Transactions.addDescription: Enter your income or expense information.

list.title: Transaction List
list.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this transaction?

Statistics.title: Statistics
Statistics.description: Track and analyze your income and expenses over time

anomaly.stableDesc: No unusual spending detected in the last 30 days.
anomaly.warningDesc: Detected spending significantly higher than your monthly average.

habits.title: Spending Habits
habits.description: Analyze when you spend most frequently (last 3 months)
habits.insightDetail: You usually spend the most around {hour} and on {day} every week.
habits.noData: Please enter more transactions for the system to analyze your habits.

Budgets.title: Budgets
Budgets.setupDescription: Set a spending limit for a category this month.
Budgets.noBudgetsDesc: Start financial planning by setting up budgets for your spending categories.
Budgets.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this budget?

SavingGoals.title: Saving Goals
SavingGoals.description: Set and track the progress of your savings
SavingGoals.addDescription: Set specific goals to save money for the future.
SavingGoals.addContributionDesc: Enter the amount you want to add to this goal.

list.noGoalsDesc: Start by adding a new saving goal to track your progress.
list.completed: 🎉 Congratulations! You have completed your goal!
list.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this goal?

errors.targetAmountMin: Target amount must be greater than 0
errors.contributionAmountMin: Contribution amount must be greater than 0

Automation.title: Automation
Automation.description: Manage recurring transactions, bills, and reminders.

recurring.title: Recurring Transactions
recurring.dialogDescription: Create an automatic income or expense schedule.
recurring.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this recurring item?

bill.title: Fixed Bills
bill.dialogDescription: Manage fixed monthly bills (electricity, water, rent...).
bill.name: Bill Name
bill.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this bill?

reminder.title: Spending Reminders
reminder.dialogDescription: Receive notifications to enter your spending at a fixed time.
reminder.name: Title
reminder.descriptionPlaceholder: Don't forget to enter today's expenses!
reminder.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this reminder?

Groups.title: Groups
Groups.description: Manage shared expenses with family, friends, or colleagues.
Groups.joinDescription: Enter an invite code to join an existing group.
Groups.createDescription: Create a new group to start sharing expenses.
Groups.noGroups: You haven't joined any groups yet.
Groups.noGroupsDesc: Create a new group or join one using an invite code.
Groups.leaveConfirm: Are you sure you want to leave this group?
Groups.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this group? All group transaction data will be lost!
Groups.membersList: List of group members. Invite code: {code}
Groups.newExpenseDesc: Enter the expense and choose how to split it.
Groups.noTransactions: No transactions in this group yet.
Groups.balanceInfo: Positive balance (+) means that person paid more than their share. Negative balance (-) means they owe the group.

errors.totalAmountError: Total split amount must equal total transaction amount
